positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a celestial wildlife motif: a magnificent, detailed silhouette of a soaring arctic fox and a crystalline owl perched on a crescent moon. The design incorporates mystical, bioluminescent elements, such as glowing star-paths and abstract nebula dust connecting the animals. The overall style is 'Neo-Mythological Minimalism,' utilizing thick, clean line work and highly contrasting solid color blocks. The composition must be perfectly centralized and suitable for a repeating print pattern. Lighting should emulate soft, ethereal glow against deep midnight blue and cosmic violet backgrounds, with accents of vibrant cyan and gold leaf texture. The final image must have crisp, vector-like clarity, optimized for fabric sublimation printing.
negative: blur, noise, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, dirty, grayscale, poor anatomy, multiple subjects, extra limbs, poorly rendered details, writing
